title: Benny's Hub App Manifest Entry
description: Contract for a single app entry in games.json / tools.json. Every entry must carry the current required fields plus a launch target (path or launchExternal). IP-4 adds optional extended fields used by the lifecycle/contract work; they are not required so existing manifests keep validating.

id.description: Stable unique identifier for the app.

title.description: Human-readable name shown in the hub.

description.description: Short blurb shown in the hub.

image.description: Relative path to the tile image.

path.description: Relative path to the app's HTML entry point. Either path or launchExternal is required.

launchExternal.description: Name of an external launcher handled by the hub instead of an in-app path.

needsServer.description: App requires the local editor/companion server to be running.

launchWindow.description: App should open in its own window rather than the hub frame.

entry.description: IP-4: normalized entry point (forward-looking replacement for path).

capabilities.description: IP-4: declared runtime capabilities used to gate launch.

needsElectron.description: App requires the Electron host (not browser-only).

controls.description: IP-4: control contract the app implements, e.g. 'scan-core@1'.

settingsSchema.description: IP-4: app-specific settings schema surfaced by the hub.
